reason: Clerks is a sharp-witted indie comedy that moves at a brisk 90-minute pace.
Duck Soup delivers nonstop Marx Brothers zaniness in under an hour and a half.
Dumbo enchants in just over an hour with timeless animation and heart.
Night of the Living Dead reinvents horror in a lean, tension-filled runtime.
Transformers: The Movie packs giant robot battles into a tight 83-minute sci-fi romp.
Bottle Rocket charms with witty heist antics in a brisk, character-driven comedy.
Beavis and Butt-head Do America brings cartoon chaos in under 90 wild minutes.
3 Ninjas: High Noon at Mega Mountain mixes family action in a lean adventure.
Black Beauty tells its moving story in a concise, heartfelt family film.
The Wrong Trousers delights with inventive stop-motion and a breezy 30-minute ride.
